name: Somany Home Innovation Limited
summary: Somany Home Innovation Limited engages in the sale and distribution of consumer and building products under the Hindware brand. It offers kitchen ensembles, such as chimneys, cooktops, built-in hobs, cooking ranges, induction cookers, food waste disposers, built-in microwave ovens, built-in ovens, dishwashers, and kitchen sinks; storage, instant, and gas water heaters; desert, personal, tower, window, and mini coolers; RO+UV and UV water purifiers, and air purifiers under the moonbow brand; ceiling fans; hinges, slides, drawers, sliding doors, alternative openings, and wall hanging brackets. The company is also involved in the retail sale and distribution of wood furniture, soft furnishings, home decor, and accessories, as well as wall fashion, modular kitchens, bath, decorative lightings, and floorings under the brand name Evok. In addition, it sells and distributes building products consisting of sanitary ware, including water closets, washbasins, pedestals, bidets, squatting pans, urinals, and cisterns; faucets, such as showers, bathroom and kitchen faucets, and accessories; wellness products comprises bath-tubs, shower panels, shower enclosures, whirlpools, and steam generators; GVT floor tiles, full-body vitrified, and wall and floor tiles; and plastic pipes and fittings, which include CPVC, UPVC, PVC, and SWR. The company was incorporated in 2017 and is based in Gurugram, India.
